name: ng-input-otp
title: Input OTP (Angular)
description: One-time password input built on Spartan-ng brain InputOtp - keyboard-driven, paste-friendly, slot-based. Use for 2FA codes, magic links, SMS verification. Mirrors React InputOTP from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-input-otp.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
